sourceSummary.oneLine: CAM350 V 10.0 output listing PCB fabrication layer and drill files for ADI_ROIC_V007_20181128-GBR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability of PCB electrical design fabrication outputs, including copper, mask, silk, fabrication, and drill files.
keyPoints: The source text identifies CAM350 V 10.0 generated output on Wed Nov 28 2018.
The output includes eight numbered board layers from TOP through BOT.
Additional fabrication outputs include top/bottom metal, mask, silk, FAB, and DRILL files.

evidence.claim: The document is associated with CAM350 V 10.0 output generated on 2018-11-28.
The PCB output includes an eight-layer stack from top to bottom.
The output includes ground, signal, and power layers.
The output includes top and bottom solder mask and silkscreen files.
The output includes a PCB drill file.
